description:
Hello Adam,

This is an initiative to reach out to understand your request for offers and programs you will be eligible for out of your Free Google Cloud Trial.

I am Insha and have been recently appointed by the Google Cloud team to work alongside you to connect to the right resources.

If this time works for you accept the invite or propose another time that works.

Regards,
Insha
